name: rabbithole
description: An infinite canvas for learning. Start from a document, select text, ask, and the answer branches out as a child document. Recurse forever.
author: Shlok Khemani

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:performance && npm run test:packaging
scripts.test:unit: node test/unit/markdown-renderer.test.mjs && node test/unit/content-blocks.test.mjs && node test/unit/base-url.test.mjs && node test/unit/pdf-provenance.test.mjs && node test/unit/pdf-selection.test.mjs && node test/unit/reducer.test.mjs && node test/unit/lifecycle.test.mjs
scripts.test:contracts: node test/contracts/assets.test.mjs && node test/contracts/mcp-markdown-wire.test.mjs && node test/contracts/filesystem-store.test.mjs && node test/contracts/indexeddb-store.test.mjs && node test/contracts/data-boundaries.test.mjs && node test/contracts/artifact-roundtrip.test.mjs && node test/contracts/compatibility-security.test.mjs && node test/contracts/fetch-proxy-worker.test.mjs && node test/contracts/ui-bundle-boundaries.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: node test/integration/pdf-ingestion.test.mjs && node test/integration/pdf-gc.test.mjs && node test/integration/image-experience.test.mjs && node test/integration/mcp-rearm.test.mjs && node test/integration/web-ingestion.test.mjs && node test/integration/artifact-portability.test.mjs && node test/integration/generation-lifecycle.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node test/e2e/web-app-setup.test.mjs && node test/e2e/web-app-learning.test.mjs && node test/e2e/web-app-canvas-sharing.test.mjs && node test/e2e/ui-primitives-browsers.test.mjs && node test/e2e/cross-host-journey.test.mjs && node test/e2e/reducer-browser-parity.test.mjs
